name: Salmon Loaf with White Sauce
recipeIngredient: 7 1/2 oz can salmon, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except Creamy Dijon Sauce; mix well.
2. Press into a lightly greased 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until set.
4. Serve with Creamy Dijon Sauce.
5. Makes 4 servings.
Creamy Dijon Sauce:
1. Saute 2 tablespoons minced onion in 1 tablespoon vegetable oil and butter until tender.
2. Blend in 1 tablespoon flour; stir in 1 cup milk.
3. Cook and stir until thickened.
4. Stir in 1 to 2 tablespoons Dijon style mustard.
5. Makes about 1 cup.
